events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a line-set replacement with proper brazing (nitrogen flowing during brazes), proper evacuation (Schrader cores removed, micron gauge at far port, 320 microns, isolated from pump, holding below 500 microns for 15 minutes before charging). This is correct procedure and order. Pass.
